description:
*Features*:

  • *3 In 1 Snow Removal Tool*:This car snow removal tool combines a snow brush,an ice scraper and a snow shovel,allowing you to easily sweep snow,scrape ice or frost and remove heavy snow from your car.
  • *2 Lighting Modes*:Featured with 2 lighting modes(Weak/Strong Light),this car ice scraper illuminates the area you’re working on,helping you work faster and more effectively even in heavy snowfall or fog.
  • *Telescopic Ice Scraper*:This windshield ice scraper is extendable from 31.89 to 39.37in,enabling you to easily reach the car roof or windshield center without moving around. Detachable,easy to carry and store.
  • *Innovative & Sturdy Materials*:Made of 3 layers of EVA,the brittle-free snow brush,flexible yet firm,effectively clears snow and ice from surfaces while being gentle on car paint and other delicate materials. EVA is water-resistant,ensuring that the snow brush remains functional and effective even when wet. The aluminum alloy ice shovel is sturdy and rustproof,able to withstand longtime use.
  • *USB Rechargeable*:Built in a 1800mAh rechargeable battery,this extendable snow scraper with brush runs up to 3 hours. USB rechargeable,easy to be powered by any devices with a USB port.

*Specifications*:

  •  Product Type: Car Snow Removal Shovel with Lights
  •  Color: Black+Orange
  •  Material: EVA+ABS+Aluminum Alloy
  •  Built-in Battery: 1Pc 1800mah Rechargeable Battery(Battery is not for individual sale)
  •  Input: DC5V/0.4A
  •  LED Bead Quantity: 2Pcs
  •  2 Lighting Modes: Weak Light, Strong Light
  •  Lighting Time: 3Hrs
  •  Charging Time: 2Hrs
  •  Extendable Length: 81-100cm/31.89-39.37in
  •  Charging Cable Length: 30.5cm/12.01in
  •  Item Size: 10x81x5cm/3.94x31.89x1.97in
  •  Item Weight: 300g/0.66 lbs
  •  Package Size: 42*13*7.5cm/16.54*5.12*2.95in
  •  Package Weight: 482g/1.06 lbs

*Package Lists*:

  • 1 x Shovel Head with Lights
  •  1 x Snow Brush Head
  •  1 x Telescopic Pole
  •  1 x DC USB Cable
  •  2 x Nuts
  •  2 x Screws
  •  1 x Hex Wrench
  •  1 x User Manual
